summary: EXP-398 implements the curmudgeon C1 H3 recommendation in full: adds a MAGNITUDE NOTE paragraph to PRED-106.detail_reasoning quantifying that Earth's ambient B (~50 µT) implies Ca²⁺ ICR at ~38 Hz (not 16 Hz), the 16 Hz frequency pins to ~21 µT (≈40% of mid-latitude ambient), and the dome's 'ECM aetheric permeability' invocation is therefore bridging a ~2× discrepancy between the dome's preferred frequency and standard Lorentz-derived ICR under Earth-typical conditions. Verification-class: factual addition, no verdict change, no kernel revision. Arithmetic independently verified (q=2e, m=40 amu, f=qB/(2πm)). Three anticipated objections addressed (category-error defense, numerology speculation, latitude variation). Replace data/predictions.json PRED-106.detail_reasoning with replacement_detail_reasoning from EXP-398; no other field changes; verdict_history preserved (silent_ignore at 2026-05-08).
